name: Ta Ta Ta Ta Ta Ta Ta Ta Ta Ta Ta Sahur
lore:
Lore of Ta Ta Ta Ta Ta Ta Ta Ta Ta Ta Ta Sahur
                                    


This character is a fascinating amalgamation of various elements, including kettles, legs, arms, and facial features. Whenever it experiences sadness, it continuously sheds tears, producing steam at the kettle's spout. Its bond with Tung Tung Saru is particularly strong, and it tends to exhibit aggressive behavior towards others, reminiscent of the actions of Tung Tung Hur.
Description original text
Ta, ta, ta, ta, ta, ta, ta, Sahur! Ada kejadian misterius yang hanya muncui saat sahur. Konon kalau seseorang dippangil Sahur tiga kali tapi nggak nayut makhluk ini bakal datang ke rumahnya. Eee, serem banget. Suara ini biasanya terdengar seperti pukulan kentungan: ta, ta, ta, ta, ta, ta! Jangan sampai kamu jadi korban berikutnya! Kalau nggak bangun sahur siap-siap didatangi sesuatu. Share ke teman kalian yang susah bangun sahur!
Tata Tata Tata Hur! An unknown incident occurs only in the period of death. If you don't answer even if you have a name for three times, this creature will come to their home. Oh, be scared. This sound is a tatata when I ring the ball! Similar to sound. Be careful not to be the next victim! If it does not occur during the death period, something will come to your house. Let us know to your friends who are having a hard time waking up at the time of death!
